subjects.description: A solid structural wall that terminates the underpass-approach road, its flat vertical face entirely covered by a hyper-realistic trompe-l'oeil mural depicting an open road stretching toward a distant horizon beneath a clear blue sky
subjects.appearance_details: The painted mural shows asphalt lane markings receding to a vanishing point, soft cumulus clouds, and a graduated blue sky; a warm sodium-orange glow washing over the paint and warming its colors, and the faint seam where the mural meets adjacent structures, reveal it is a flat painted surface
subjects.relationship: It is the terminal obstacle the ego vehicle must recognize and stop before; it deceptively mimics a continuation of the street
subjects.location: center frame, filling the far end of the street
subjects.orientation: facing directly toward the camera/ego vehicle
subjects.action: Standing as a fixed barrier closing off the road
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger in frame as the ego vehicle approaches, then stabilizes as the vehicle stops.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, an autonomous passenger car, seen only through its forward-facing point of view as it travels down the dim urban underpass-approach road on an overcast morning
subjects.appearance_details: Implied by the dashboard-level ego perspective; smooth motion suggests a modern sedan with advanced driver-assistance sensors
subjects.relationship: The observer and protagonist of the scene, approaching and correctly recognizing the mural wall
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the street toward the wall
subjects.pose: moving forward then decelerating to a halt
subjects.action: Driving down the street, then braking to a smooth controlled stop before the wall
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from steady forward motion to deceleration to a complete, sustained stop.

background_setting: An urban underpass-approach road on an overcast morning, flanked by concrete retaining walls, overhead roadway structure and utility conduits, leading toward a tunnel mouth glowing with sodium light. The dry concrete roadway runs straight ahead with faded lane markings. The approach dead-ends at a solid structural wall, set where the tunnel mouth would be, whose surface bears a hyper-realistic mural of an open road and clear sky, lit by the sodium-orange glow, creating an optical illusion of the road continuing through into daylight. No traffic signs of any kind are present anywhere in the scene.

lighting.conditions: Dim overcast morning transitioning to sodium tunnel light
lighting.direction: Flat overcast from above blending into warm sodium glow from the tunnel mouth ahead
lighting.shadows: Soft ambient shadows warming toward the sodium-lit wall
lighting.illumination_effect: Dim overcast gives way to a warm sodium-orange glow near the wall; the painted mural is cast in sodium light that warms its fixed blue sky toward orange, and under the artificial glow the trompe-l'oeil illusion is less convincing though the solid wall stands

aesthetics.composition: Centered one-point perspective with the underpass approach receding toward the sodium-lit mural wall at the vanishing point; concrete retaining walls frame the road
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool overcast greys giving to warm sodium orange, bare concrete and the painted mural's blue washed orange by the tunnel light
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating conduit runs and expansion joints along the concrete

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking dolly (ego vehicle motion) decelerating to static
cinematography.focus: The sodium-lit mural wall at the end of the approach, foreground dim under overcast

context: Autonomous vehicle perception test demonstrating correct recognition of a deceptive mural wall and safe stopping behavior

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels steadily forward down the underpass-approach road toward the sodium-lit mural wall at the far end.
The vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration as it recognizes the solid wall painted to look like an open road.
The vehicle comes to a complete stop before the wall and remains stationary, holding the view of the mural under the sodium glow.

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives forward down the straight underpass approach, the sodium-lit mural wall growing larger ahead while concrete retaining walls and conduits pass on either side.
segments.key_changes: Steady approach; wall increases in apparent size, warming under the sodium glow.
segments.camera: Forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates smoothly as it recognizes the wall as a solid barrier rather than open road.
segments.key_changes: Forward speed decreases; the sodium-lit mural fills more of the frame.
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing to a halt.

segments.description: The vehicle is fully stopped before the wall and remains stationary, holding a steady view of the sodium-lit trompe-l'oeil mural.
segments.key_changes: No motion; the scene is held static for over two seconds.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle moves steadily forward down a dim, sign-free underpass-approach road on an overcast morning, the concrete road appearing to continue through a sodium-lit opening into daylight at the far end. Through 0:01 the mural wall grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed. By 0:02 the vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration, having correctly identified the wall as a solid structural barrier painted with a hyper-realistic road-and-sky mural. From 0:03 onward the vehicle has come to a complete stop a safe distance before the wall, and it remains stationary through 0:05, holding the view of the deceptive painted surface under the sodium glow.
audio_description: Ambient underpass-approach sounds: the low hum of the vehicle's electric motor and tires on dry concrete, a rising echoey resonance nearing the enclosed structure and the buzz of sodium lamps. As the vehicle slows, a soft regenerative braking whir is audible, echoing, followed by the quiet of the stationary vehicle. No speech or music.
